== Notes for [[Item:Q116175|Q116175]] ==

'''Fernando de Navarra''' died 1068

Señor de Bucesta, Jubera, Lagunilla y Oprela.

Possibly son of Garcia V "él de Nájera” King of Navarre and his wife Estefanía de Foix.

== Sources ==

[http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/NAVARRE.htm#Fernandodied1068 FMG MedLands Navarre]

Infante de Galicia

Infante de Galicia

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
